medical_history.history_of_present_illness: First admitted at 5 months with coughing and wheezing, treated with inhaler bronchodilator and steroid therapy. At 6 months, severe allergic reaction to cow’s milk. Hospitalized at 7 months with pneumonia and bronchial hyper-reactivity. Laboratory results showed leukocytosis and positive anti-CMV IgM antibody.
medical_history.past_medical_history: First pregnancy resulted in abortion. First child died at 4 years with atopic dermatitis and chronic diarrhea. Present case had severe allergic reaction with cow’s milk.
medical_history.family_history: Parents are first degree cousins. First child died with atopic dermatitis and chronic diarrhea.

physical_examination.general_examination: Silvery-gray hair and eyebrow and eyelashes, eczema. Development was normal. Neurological examination was unremarkable. Microscopic examination of hair shafts showed large discrete clumps of melanin pigment.
